trial_details.trajectory:
Okay, let's fix the Kubernetes pod "misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-4js8p" in namespace "case6-test".The pod is in the ErrImageNeverPull status, which indicates that the image being pulled for the container is not available.The issue is that the image "misspeling-app:latset" is not available, so the pod is stuck in the ErrImageNeverPull state.The image reference has been fixed from "misspeling-app:latset" to "misspelling-app:latest".

FIX COMPLETE

## COMMANDS EXECUTED:
1. $ kubectl get pod misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-4js8p -n case6-test
   Output: NAME                                      READY   STATUS              RESTARTS   AGE
misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-4js8p   0/1     ErrImageNeverPull   0          14s...
2. $ kubectl describe pod misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-4js8p -n case6-test
   Output: Name:             misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-4js8p
Namespace:        case6-test
Priority:         0
Service Account:  default
Node:             minikube/192.168.49.2
Start Time:       Mon, 15 D...
3. $ kubectl patch deployment misspelling-deployment -n case6-test --type=json -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/spec/template/spec/containers/0/image", "value": "misspelling-app:latest"}]'
   Output: deployment.apps/misspelling-deployment patched...
